qaPair.title: QA Pair
qaPair.description: A question-answer pair in the global knowledge base.

question.description: The question extracted or mapped from the source.

answer.description: The correct answer to the question.

sourceDetail.description: Where the QA pair came from (e.g. filename).

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who uploaded this.

isPublic.description: Always true for this shared database.

knowledgeBase.description: The shared global collection of QA pairs.
